data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. CLASSIC BOODIE finished well back at Q Lakeside last time when a 12 length sixth (22.54) but scored four back at Q Lakeside (19.76). Worth another chance. 8. HAVOC was below best last time at Capalaba (22.61) in a P5, finishing a 37 length seventh. Has already won out of this draw. Can hit the frame with the right run. 2. WEATHER MAN RICK showed little early speed at his last couple, the latest finishing sixth (22.48) in a Grade 5 at Q Lakeside. Should be thereabouts. 5. SHIMA POLLY generally performs well over this distance.","runners":[1,8,2,5],"exclusive":false}
